request_payload.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how underfunding our military puts our nation at risk. While some worry about budget cuts elsewhere, we can't afford to weaken our defenses. Allies like Japan and South Korea are increasing their contributions - it's time we do the same. Our safety shouldn't be compromised for short-term savings. #NationalSecurityFirst
